title: Junior UI Developer
description: Canva is used by 185+ million people globally to create beautiful designs. We're democratizing design, one drag-and-drop at a time. As a UI Developer, you'll build interfaces that millions use to express themselves creatively.
responsibilities: Support business operations and contribute to team objectives
Collaborate with cross-functional teams on key projects
Identify improvement opportunities and implement solutions
Ensure compliance with company policies and regulations
benefits: Competitive health, dental, and vision coverage
Unlimited PTO and remote work flexibility
Equity options and/or stock purchase plan
